title: Light-band route support phase
summary: Lane 2 should support the next tactile route wave with one compact carrier/content pack in Tundra or Coastal Scrub, without adding more notebook density.

execution_order.goal: Prepare the light-band route-support carrier handoff.
execution_order.why_now: The next route-feel proof needs a little authored support, not another dense note pass.

execution_order.goal: Implement one compact route-support carrier pack.
execution_order.why_now: A tiny same-band support pack can make the next tactile route proof feel richer without crowding the notebook.

execution_order.goal: Review the light-band route-support carrier pack.
execution_order.why_now: The content should deepen route feel without reopening notebook density problems.

guardrails: Do not add a new comparison page, close-look family, or sketchbook strip in this pass.
Avoid the beach opener and the right half of krummholz-belt.
Prefer same-band route carriers over broader note growth.

preferred_shape: one compact same-band authored support cluster beside the existing thaw-window clue path
favor authored placements first and only use a tiny existing spawn-table nudge if the band still reads thin
avoid: new ecosystem notes for this pass
verification: focused tundra biome coverage for the thaw-skirt band
seeded handheld browser proof for the thaw-skirt route band
